title: For The Record
description: Nancy and David are dead. And even worse, they are stuck in the same room together for all eternity, unless they can come to an agreement. Through creating a timeline of music from their lifetime of memories, they uncover whether their lives and loves could have ever worked out differently. They quickly learn that if they are not honest with their feelings, the way out of the room will lead somewhere... unusual, certainly not the afterlife they'd expected. For The Record is an emotional and comedic exploration of the afterlife, secrets, and regrets. With a mystical door, cryptic vinyl player, and mysterious puppets, could the-one-that-got-away have ever been The One, if only they had met at the right time? Salt Air Stories is a brand new production company, made up of passionate storytellers who want to explore myths and fables in all of their forms. Join us around the campfire. From the creative minds behind OffFest Nominated comedy, Rambunctious Scallywag:

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
